fields.name: Server Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the URL of the Dataverse environment that you want to connect to.

fields.name: User Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the user that will be used to connect to the Dataverse environment and synchronize data. This must not be the administrator user account.

fields.name: Is Enabled
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether data synchronization with the Dataverse environment is enabled. When you select this check box, you will be prompted to sign-in with an administrator user account and give consent to the app registration that will be used to connect to Dataverse. The account will be used one time to install and configure components that the integration requires.

fields.name: Proxy Version
fields.tooltip: Specifies the software development kit version that is used to connect to the Dataverse environment.

fields.name: Authentication Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the authentication type that will be used to authenticate with the Dataverse environment.

fields.name: Connection String
fields.tooltip: Specifies the connection string that will be used to connect to the Dataverse environment.

fields.name: Ownership Model
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of owner that will be assigned to any row that is created while synchronizing from Business Central to Dataverse.

fields.name: Business Unit Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the business unit that you want to connect to in the Dataverse environment.

fields.name: Client Id
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the Microsoft Entra application that will be used to connect to the Dataverse environment.

fields.name: Redirect URL
fields.tooltip: Specifies the Redirect URL of the Microsoft Entra app registration that will be used to connect to the Dataverse environment.
